hypothesis: If features from pretrained single-gas (Ar and O2) etch-rate networks are fused in a two-node GraphSAGE model with gas-fraction inputs, then the model will achieve lower weighted MSE and higher R² in predicting Ar/O2 mixture radial etching rates—including on unseen power/pressure ranges and low xAr cases—than an FNN or alternative GNNs because it leverages transferable single-gas representations and compositional structure.
